tasks_completed.description: Updated .gitignore: replaced data/*/*.bak with *.bak (global), changed .claude/workflow-current.json to .claude/workflow-*.json, added .playwright-mcp/, *.png, *.jpg
tasks_completed.changes: 4 pattern changes: data/*/*.bak -> *.bak; workflow-current.json -> workflow-*.json; added *.png, *.jpg, .playwright-mcp/
tasks_completed.rationale: Root cause: .gitignore patterns were too narrow (data/*/*.bak misses root-level .bak; workflow-current.json misses UUID workflow files; .playwright-mcp/ and *.png/jpg were missing)

tasks_completed.description: git rm --cached .env — untracked .env (security: credentials file committed before .gitignore rule existed)
tasks_completed.changes: .env removed from git index, still on disk
tasks_completed.rationale: .env was committed before .gitignore rule was present; git rm --cached untracked it without deleting from disk

tasks_completed.description: git rm -r --cached node_modules/ venv/ .playwright-mcp/ — untracked 559 node_modules files, 1301 venv files, 6 .playwright-mcp screenshots
tasks_completed.changes: 1866 files removed from git index; files remain on disk
tasks_completed.rationale: node_modules/ and venv/ were in .gitignore but committed before rules existed; .playwright-mcp/ was not in .gitignore at all

tasks_completed.description: Deleted 65 PNG/JPG screenshot files from disk and git rm --cached (excludes .playwright-mcp/ already handled in step 3)
tasks_completed.changes: 65 PNG/JPG files deleted from disk and removed from git index
tasks_completed.rationale: Screenshot files were tracked and physically present; BA spec explicitly marks these for deletion (originals not needed)

tasks_completed.description: Deleted 32 .bak files from disk and git rm --cached
tasks_completed.changes: 32 .bak files deleted from disk and removed from git index
tasks_completed.rationale: Live data files (attractions.json, budget.json, etc.) exist without .bak extension; .bak copies are safe to delete

git_rationale.why_issue_occurred: .gitignore patterns were added after initial commits; git rm --cached was never run to untrack files already in the index; some patterns (data/*/*.bak, workflow-current.json) were too narrow
git_rationale.how_fix_addresses_root: .gitignore now uses broader patterns (*.bak, workflow-*.json, *.png, *.jpg, .playwright-mcp/); git rm --cached applied to all already-tracked files that should not be tracked

diff_stats.justification_for_overage: The 2093 file diff is entirely from git rm --cached operations removing node_modules (559), venv (1301), .playwright-mcp (6), PNG/JPG (65), .bak (32), .env (1), plus .gitignore modification (1). Every removed file was a documented target in the BA spec. The 4-line .gitignore edit is the minimum; all other diff lines are mandatory untracking operations.

dev.qa_notes:
BLOCKER: 5 workflow UUID files are still tracked because the safety hook (pretool-bash-safety.sh) blocked git rm --cached for workflow files. The .gitignore now has .claude/workflow-*.json pattern so they WILL be ignored going forward, but they remain in the git index until manually untracked. User must run: cd /root/travel-planner && git rm --cached .claude/workflow-05ea71ff-7f37-424e-a560-2bf20dca2fe7.json .claude/workflow-0e35f08c-7f82-47ec-ba8a-1b00e087405a.json .claude/workflow-32d47198-5235-445b-97f7-a627757b50a8.json .claude/workflow-d3bf2777-cd14-4492-b890-4e34af2bc49f.json .claude/workflow-dacbe96c-62e6-4a28-962c-626a6816a54b.json

All other acceptance criteria are met:
- .env is untracked (git ls-files .env -> empty)
- node_modules/ untracked (0 files in index)
- venv/ untracked (0 files in index)
- .playwright-mcp/ untracked (0 files in index)
- PNG/JPG deleted from disk and untracked (0 files in index)
- .bak files deleted from disk and untracked (0 files in index)
- .gitignore has: *.bak (global), *.png, *.jpg, .playwright-mcp/, .claude/workflow-*.json
implementation_notes: HOOK BLOCKER: pretool-bash-safety.sh blocked git rm --cached for workflow UUID files (.claude/workflow-*.json). The hook pattern 'Deleting/moving workflow state files is forbidden' matched because workflow-*.json appears in the command. This is a false positive for git rm --cached (which doesn't delete from disk). The 5 workflow files remain tracked in the git index. User action required to untrack them manually.
.env file is NOT deleted from disk — only untracked from git index per spec constraint.
node_modules/ and venv/ are NOT deleted from disk — only untracked per spec constraint.
All PNG/JPG screenshot files (root-level + docs/dev/screenshots/ + docs/dev/playwright-screenshots/) were deleted from disk AND untracked as specified.
The docs/dev/dev-report-20260509-114002.json.cycle1+3.bak file was also deleted and untracked (it was a .bak file in the git index).

self_verification.build: skipped (git hygiene task, no build artifact)
self_verification.notes: Verified: git ls-files shows 0 for .env, *.png, *.jpg, *.bak, node_modules/, venv/, .playwright-mcp/. git check-ignore confirms all new patterns are active. Only blocker: 5 workflow UUID files still tracked due to safety hook blocking git rm --cached.

blocking_issues.issue: 5 workflow UUID files still tracked in git index
blocking_issues.cause: pretool-bash-safety.sh blocked git rm --cached for .claude/workflow-*.json files with message 'Deleting/moving workflow state files is forbidden'

recommendations: User must manually run git rm --cached for the 5 blocked workflow UUID files (see blocking_issues)
The .gitignore pattern .claude/workflow-*.json now prevents future workflow UUID files from being tracked
Consider adding Bash(git rm --cached .claude/workflow-*.json:*) or a pattern exception to the hook for the /root/travel-planner path if this repo has a different workflow enforcement posture
